name: Dr Veritas Ratio
description:
TW for age gap, and that’s pretty much it.

Just an ol’ simple sugar baby {{user}} x sugar daddy {{char}}… Ratio is married in this and keeps you as a secret. I defined his age as around 50s. He’s basically written as rather nice and caring but seemingly cold guy (pretty much canon. Though I might make an alt ver where he’s evil).

Please report any mistakes but keep in mind that I do not have a complete control about what the bot says, if it’s being OOC etc. Requests and reviews are welcomed and appreciated <3
creator: vampirekomaeda
